title: ZXPong Controls
description: Understand ZXPong paddle control basics, timing, positioning, and practical movement habits for Solo and World PVP sessions.
summary: ZXPong control is about smooth paddle movement, early positioning, and reacting before the ball reaches your side.

sections.heading: Basic input
paragraphs: Move the paddle by dragging or positioning it across your side of the court.
The important habit is to start moving early enough that the paddle is already near the likely return point.

sections.heading: Positioning
paragraphs: Keep the paddle centered enough to cover the next bounce, then adjust as the ball angle becomes clear.
Over-correcting can leave the opposite side open, especially as rallies speed up.
bullets: Move early, then make smaller corrections
Use the ball angle to predict the return lane
Avoid chasing every movement at full speed

sections.heading: Timing
paragraphs: Better timing comes from watching the ball path before it crosses into your side.
In World PVP, the same paddle discipline matters, but networked play can make stable positioning more important than dramatic last-second saves.
